{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Auspicious Beam
|class_id=20298
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=At the start of the year, visit relatives and friends to exchange blessings, fostering more harmonious interpersonal relationships!
|fame=15
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 1400/1400
}}
